title.en: SEPARATING SOLID MATERIALS USING LIQUIDS OR USING PNEUMATIC TABLES OR JIGS
Conditioning for facilitating separation by altering physical properties of the matter to be treated
Preparatory heating
by additives
by varying ambient atmospheric pressure
Separating by pneumatic tables or by pneumatic jigs
{the currents being pulsating, e.g. pneumatic jigs; combination of continuous and pulsating currents}
using swinging or shaking tables
using rotary tables or tables formed by travelling belts
using fixed and inclined tables {; using stationary pneumatic tables, e.g. fluidised beds}
Washing granular, powdered or lumpy materials; Wet separating (separating by pneumatic tables or by pneumatic jigs B03B4/00)
using shaken, pulsated or stirred beds as the principal means of separation (B03B5/28, B03B5/48 take precedence)
by sink-float separation
by mechanical classifiers
by non-mechanical classifiers, e.g. slime tanks  (hydraulic classifiers B03B5/62; water impulse classifiers B03B5/68)
by hydraulic classifiers, e.g. of launder, tank, spiral or helical chute concentrator type
by water impulse (hydraulic classifiers B03B5/62)
Combinations of wet processes or apparatus with other processes or apparatus, e.g. for dressing ores or garbage
General arrangement of separating plant, e.g. flow sheets
{specially adapted for coal}
specially adapted for oil-sand, oil-chalk, oil-shales, ozokerite, bitumen, or the like
specially adapted for furnace residues, smeltings, or foundry slags
specially adapted for refuse
Feed or discharge devices integral with washing or wet-separating equipment
{Rotary feeding devices}
{Lifting wheel dischargers}
{Scraper dischargers}
{Screw dischargers}
Control arrangements specially adapted for wet-separating apparatus or for dressing plant, using physical effects
{Methods or arrangements for controlling the physical properties of heavy media, e.g. density, concentration or viscosity}
using optical effects
using electrical or electromagnetic effects
using absorption or reflection of radioactive emanation
